steps.title: Focus on documentation method
steps.content: The question asks how Wilkerson documents the Great Migration. The key note says she narrates the personal journeys of Ida Mae Gladney and Robert Pershing Foster, among others, so the sentence must emphasize that method.

steps.title: Reject award and scope details
steps.content: Choice A focuses on awards. Choice C mentions one personal journey but shifts attention to the book being award-winning. Choice D describes a city affected by the Great Migration rather than Wilkerson's method. The remaining choice states that she chronicles the history by narrating individual journeys. The answer is B.
